description: Angular SPA Real User Monitoring via Grafana Faro — monitor Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS, FCP, TTFB), session trends, and JavaScript exceptions. Filter by environment and app using the top variables.

options.content:
## CI-CD Frontend RUM — Angular / Grafana Faro

Real User Monitoring for the Angular SPA instrumented with Grafana Faro. Every event the SDK emits (page loads, Web Vitals measurements, exceptions, user sessions) is collected by the otel-collector, shipped to **Loki** as structured logs, and correlated with **Tempo** browser traces.

---

### How to use the variables

| Variable | Type | How to use |
|---|---|---|
| **Environment** | Dropdown | Switch between `develop`, `staging`, `production` |
| **App** | Dropdown | Select the Faro-instrumented app (e.g. `angular-gateway`) |
| **App Version** | Text (regex) | Type `.*` for all versions (default). Type `0\.0\.1$` to pin a specific build, or `0\.0\.1\|0\.0\.2` to compare two deploys side by side. Trend panels split lines by version automatically. |
| **Browser** | Dropdown | Filter all CWV and exception panels to a specific browser, or leave on **All** |
| **Page URL filter** | Text (regex) | Scope page-level panels to a URL pattern, e.g. `/checkout` |

---

### Colour scale

> All threshold colours follow **Google Core Web Vitals** standards throughout the dashboard.

| Colour | Meaning | LCP | INP | CLS | FCP | TTFB |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Green | Good | < 2.5 s | < 200 ms | < 0.10 | < 1.8 s | < 800 ms |
| Yellow | Needs improvement | 2.5 - 4 s | 200 - 500 ms | 0.10 - 0.25 | 1.8 - 3 s | 800 ms - 1.8 s |
| Red | Poor | > 4 s | > 500 ms | > 0.25 | > 3 s | > 1.8 s |

---

### Dashboard sections

| Section | What it answers |
|---|---|
| **Overview** | High-level KPIs: active sessions, exception count, Web Vitals sample volume, total RUM events, unique browsers |
| **Core Web Vitals (p75)** | Stat cards for current p75 of LCP, INP, CLS, FCP, TTFB. Trend lines split by `app_version` so you can see a CWV regression the moment a new build is deployed |
| **Web Vitals Pass Rate** | % of real measurements that hit the Good threshold for LCP, INP, and FCP. A drop here after a deploy is the first sign of a regression |
| **Errors & exceptions** | Exception volume over time, top browsers and pages by exception count, breakdown by error type, raw exception log stream |
| **Sessions & audience** | Session trend, browser market share, OS and mobile breakdown |
| **Page & Browser Performance** | LCP p75 split by browser (spot browser-specific regressions), slowest pages ranked by LCP p75, exception rate per 100 page loads |
| **Live RUM logs & browser traces** | Full raw Faro event stream for ad-hoc debugging, plus Tempo browser trace list with span durations |

---

*Pipeline: Faro SDK -> otel-collector -> Loki (measurements / exceptions / sessions) + Tempo (browser traces)*

panels.description: Unique session IDs seen in the selected range. Turns red if sessions drop to 0 — may indicate broken instrumentation or a deploy failure.

targets.expr: count(count by (session_id)(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | session_id!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Sessions

panels.description: Total JavaScript exceptions captured by Faro. Non-zero warrants investigation in the Errors section below.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`exception` [$__range]))

panels.title: Exceptions

panels.description: Total Web-Vitals measurement events received. Each page load contributes one sample per metric.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`measurement` [$__range]))

panels.title: Measurements (Web-Vitals samples)

panels.description: All Faro beacon events (logs, measurements, exceptions, events) in the selected range.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} [$__range]))

panels.title: Total RUM events

panels.description: Number of distinct browser types active in the selected range. Useful for compatibility awareness.

targets.expr: count(count by (browser_name)(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | browser_name!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Browsers seen

panels.description: Largest Contentful Paint p75. Google thresholds: ≤2.5s good / ≤4s needs improvement / >4s poor.

targets.expr: avg by () (quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`measurement` | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | lcp!="" | unwrap lcp | __error__="" [$__range]))

panels.title: LCP

panels.description: Interaction to Next Paint p75. Google thresholds: ≤200ms good / ≤500ms needs improvement / >500ms poor.

targets.expr: avg by () (quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`measurement` | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | inp!="" | unwrap inp | __error__="" [$__range]))

panels.title: INP

panels.description: Cumulative Layout Shift p75 (unitless score). Google thresholds: ≤0.1 good / ≤0.25 needs improvement / >0.25 poor.

targets.expr: avg by () (quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`measurement` | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | cls!="" | unwrap cls | __error__="" [$__range]))

panels.title: CLS

panels.description: First Contentful Paint p75. Google thresholds: ≤1.8s good / ≤3s needs improvement / >3s poor.

targets.expr: avg by () (quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`measurement` | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | fcp!="" | unwrap fcp | __error__="" [$__range]))

panels.title: FCP

panels.description: Time to First Byte p75. Google thresholds: ≤800ms good / ≤1.8s needs improvement / >1.8s poor.

targets.expr: avg by () (quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`measurement` | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | ttfb!="" | unwrap ttfb | __error__="" [$__range]))

panels.title: TTFB

panels.description: Largest Contentful Paint 75th percentile trend. Rising values = slower rendering (network, TTFB, or image size).

targets.expr: avg by (app_version) (quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`measurement` | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | lcp!="" | unwrap lcp | __error__="" [$__auto]))

panels.title: LCP p75 over time

panels.description: Interaction to Next Paint 75th percentile trend. Spikes correlate with long JavaScript tasks.

targets.expr: avg by (app_version) (quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`measurement` | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | inp!="" | unwrap inp | __error__="" [$__auto]))

panels.title: INP p75 over time

panels.description: Cumulative Layout Shift 75th percentile trend. Spikes = layout instability from late-loading images or ads.

targets.expr: avg by (app_version) (quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`measurement` | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | cls!="" | unwrap cls | __error__="" [$__auto]))

panels.title: CLS p75 over time

panels.description: First Contentful Paint 75th percentile trend split by app version. Rising values = render-blocking resources or large DOM.

targets.expr: avg by (app_version) (quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="measurement" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | fcp!="" | unwrap fcp | __error__="" [$__auto]))

panels.title: FCP p75 over time

panels.description: Time to First Byte 75th percentile trend split by app version. Spikes indicate backend or CDN latency regressions.

targets.expr: avg by (app_version) (quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="measurement" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | ttfb!="" | unwrap ttfb | __error__="" [$__auto]))

panels.title: TTFB p75 over time

panels.description: Share of page loads with LCP ≤ 2.5 s (Google 'good' threshold). Target: ≥ 75%.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="measurement" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | lcp != "" | lcp <= 2500 [$__range]))

sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="measurement" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | lcp != "" [$__range]))

panels.title: % Good LCP

panels.description: Share of page loads with INP ≤ 200 ms (Google 'good' threshold). Target: ≥ 75%.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="measurement" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | inp != "" | inp <= 200 [$__range]))

sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="measurement" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | inp != "" [$__range]))

panels.title: % Good INP

panels.description: Share of page loads with FCP ≤ 1.8 s (Google 'good' threshold). Target: ≥ 75%.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="measurement" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | fcp != "" | fcp <= 1800 [$__range]))

sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="measurement" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | fcp != "" [$__range]))

panels.title: % Good FCP

panels.description: JavaScript exception rate over time. Orange threshold at 1, red at 10 — adjust to your baseline. Correlate spikes with deployments.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`exception` [$__auto]))

panels.title: Exceptions over time

panels.description: Which browser types generate the most exceptions. Cell colour reflects exception count — orange = low, red = elevated. Helps triage browser-specific bugs.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (browser_name)(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`exception` [$__range])))

panels.title: Top browsers by exceptions

panels.description: Live stream of Faro exception events. Click a row to expand the stack trace and attributes.

targets.expr: {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | detected_level=~"$level" | logfmt | kind=`exception`

panels.title: Recent exceptions

panels.description: Top exception types in the selected range. Helps identify whether errors are isolated incidents or systematic JS bugs.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (type)(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="exception" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" [$__range])))

panels.title: Exception breakdown by type

panels.description: Pages generating the most exceptions. Pinpoints which routes have broken JS. Cross-reference with the exception type table.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (page_url)(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="exception" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" [$__range])))

panels.title: Top pages by exceptions

panels.description: Unique session count per interval. Sudden drops may indicate a deploy failure or broken Faro instrumentation.

targets.expr: count(count by (session_id)(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | session_id!="" [$__auto])))

panels.title: Sessions over time

panels.description: Browser name/version breakdown by event count.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (browser_name, browser_version)(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | browser_name!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Popular browsers

panels.description: Operating system and mobile flag breakdown. Flags mobile users who may experience Core Web Vitals differently.

targets.expr: sum by (browser_os, browser_mobile)(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | browser_os!="" [$__range]))

panels.title: OS / mobile

panels.description: Exceptions per 100 page loads over time. Normalised metric — more reliable than raw counts at variable traffic levels.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`exception` [$__auto]))
sum(count_over_time({service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind=`measurement` [$__auto]))

panels.title: Exception rate (per 100 page loads)

panels.description: LCP p75 trend split by browser. Diverging lines indicate browser-specific performance regressions.

targets.expr: avg by (browser_name) (quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="measurement" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | lcp!="" | unwrap lcp | __error__="" [$__auto]))

panels.title: LCP p75 by browser

panels.description: Top 10 slowest pages by LCP p75. Sort by Value to find the worst-performing routes. Filter using the Page URL variable.

targets.expr: topk(10, avg by (page_url)(quantile_over_time(0.75, {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | logfmt | kind="measurement" | app_version=~"$app_version" | browser_name=~"$browser_name" | lcp!="" | unwrap lcp | __error__="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Slowest pages by LCP p75

panels.description: Raw Faro beacon stream (all kinds). Use for real-time debugging; filter by level variable for errors.

targets.expr: {service_name="$app", deployment_environment="$deployment_environment"} | detected_level=~"$level" | logfmt

panels.title: Live RUM events

panels.description: Browser-initiated traces propagated via Faro. Click a Trace ID to open the full trace.
panels.title: Browser traces (Tempo)

list.description: Filter log panels by severity (detected_level). All = everything incl. plain-text (unknown).
list.label: Log level
list.name: level

list.description: Regex filter for app_version — use .* for all, or e.g. 0\.0\.1$ for a specific build
list.label: App Version
list.name: app_version

title: CI-CD Frontend RUM (Angular / Faro)
